name: @intentsolutionsio/jeremy-google-adk
description: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) SDK starter kit for building Claude-powered AI agents with React patterns, multi-agent orchestration, and tool integration

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install jeremy-google-adk\\n  or /plugin install jeremy-google-adk@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
